captions_untagged.explicit: Back repping Lehigh for the alumni lacrosse tournament. Always good catching up with the old crew between games, even if the legs don't move quite like they used to.
captions_untagged.moderate: Nothing beats running into old buddies at these weekend tournaments. The stories get more exaggerated every single year we come out here.
captions_untagged.no_leak: Perfect weather for an outdoor weekend event. Lots of catching up, good energy, and just enjoying the sunshine.
